name: execute_tool
description: Generic tool executor. Use this to call any MCP tool that is registered on the server but not yet visible in the tool list. Pass the tool class name and a JSON string of arguments.

toolName.description: The tool class name to execute, e.g. 'get_customer_data'

arguments.description: JSON string of arguments to pass to the tool, e.g. '{"customerName": "Sport", "country": "USA"}'
